name: Chocolate Graham Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream butter, sugars, egg, vanilla, and milk until smooth.
3. Mix in dry ingredients (flour, graham cracker crumbs, baking soda, salt, cinnamon) until just combined.
4. Stir in chocolate chips.
5. Drop dough by spoonfuls onto a lined cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly golden and set.
7. Allow to cool for 1 minute on the sheet before removing from heat.
